steps: Document Maestro CLI install: curl -Ls 'https://get.maestro.mobile.dev' | bash
userStories.acceptance: Playwright removed. maestro/ exists. pnpm tsc, pnpm lint, pnpm test pass.

steps: Search for ?? null, ?? undefined, || fallback in src/config/, src/rendering/, src/audio/
Search for empty catch blocks in asset loading
Replace with throw new Error() including asset name/path
userStories.acceptance: No silent fallbacks in asset loading. Tests confirm throw on missing. pnpm tsc, lint, test pass.

steps: Migrate floorTextureAssets.ts to import from JSON
Add type definitions for JSON schema
Add test verifying all JSON textures resolve
userStories.acceptance: Zero require() for floor textures. All from JSON. pnpm tsc, lint, test pass.

steps: Identify missing model IDs (machine_generator etc) in cityComposites
Add missing entries to manifest or fix references
Remove test mocks that work around missing models
userStories.acceptance: city:ingest produces complete manifest. No missing model IDs. Tests pass without model mocks.

steps: New game, confirm ~20 pre-discovered cells visible
userStories.acceptance: Floor visible on new game. No black void. Screenshot or note in progress.

steps: Select unit, right-click, confirm radial appears
Save, quit, load, confirm same state
userStories.acceptance: All flows work in browser. Document in progress.txt.

steps: Port from tests/e2e/title.spec.ts: assertVisible SYNTHETERIA, title-new_game, title-settings
userStories.acceptance: maestro test title.yaml runs. Asserts pass. Requires dev build or web URL.
userStories.notes: Flow created; maestro test requires connected device/simulator.

steps: Clear persistence equivalent (launch with fresh state)
userStories.acceptance: maestro test onboarding.yaml runs. Full onboarding flow passes.
maestro test ai-playtest.yaml runs. 100-turn playtest completes or documents limits.

steps: Port TitleScreen, NewGameModal, LoadingOverlay to RNTL
userStories.acceptance: 2D UI components have RNTL tests. pnpm test passes. No Playwright CT for these.

steps: Port EcumenopolisWorld, CityKitLab, StructurePlacement to scene-graph assertions
Handle useFrame with advanceFrames() if needed
userStories.acceptance: R3F components have Jest tests via test-renderer. pnpm test passes.

steps: Add distinct tint/aura for cultist units in UnitRenderer
Cultist units visually distinct from player bots
userStories.acceptance: Cultist units look different. Config-driven. pnpm tsc, lint, test pass. Verify in browser.

steps: Mark I-V badge above units (UnitRenderer or GlowRingRenderer)
Mark badge color: I=white, II=green, III=blue, IV=purple, V=gold
userStories.acceptance: Mark badges visible. Damage states visible. pnpm tsc, lint, test pass. Verify in browser.

steps: Add 'Upgrade' radial action when unit adjacent to Motor Pool
Resource check, tier gate (Basic→II, Advanced→III, Elite→V)
Tests: resource check, tier gate, upgrade success
userStories.acceptance: Upgrade radial works. Resources deducted. Tier gates enforced. pnpm test passes.

steps: Hack radial when player unit adjacent to hostile
On completion: faction change to player
Tests: hack success, broken link failure
userStories.acceptance: Hack converts hostile to player. Progress resets if link broken. pnpm test passes.

steps: Spawn rate scales with player territory size
userStories.acceptance: Cultist pressure responds to expansion. Config-driven. pnpm test passes.

steps: Cohesive environmental presence for storm + wormhole
Wormhole at hypercane eye as persistent presence
userStories.acceptance: Storm and wormhole feel cohesive. Verify in browser.

steps: Breach crack shader at zone edges
userStories.acceptance: Zone transitions smooth. No hard edges. Verify in browser.

steps: Camera-following shader plane under structural floor
No dark void at viewport edges
userStories.acceptance: No dark void edges. Floor fills viewport. Verify in browser.

steps: Wire chunkLoader to live camera position
Verify per-chunk InstancedBuildingRenderer receives loaded chunks
userStories.acceptance: Chunks load/unload as camera moves. Structures render per chunk. pnpm test passes.

steps: Config-driven floor materials for pit/undermaterial tiles
userStories.acceptance: Pit interiors have textures. Config-driven. pnpm tsc, lint, test pass.
Keyboard/screen reader navigable. WCAG basics. pnpm tsc, lint, test pass.

steps: Add Maestro Cloud to eas.json workflow
Or document local simulator run for Maestro
userStories.acceptance: Maestro runs in CI or docs explain local run.

steps: Document any remaining issues in progress.txt
userStories.acceptance: Playthrough complete. Issues documented. activeContext updated.
